topic.title: 호텔 추천 요청하기
topic.description: 호텔 추천 요청 시 유용한 기본적인 영어 표현을 익힙니다.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 안녕하세요. 혹시 호텔 좀 추천해 주실 수 있나요?
저는 1박에 100달러 이하로 깨끗하고 조용한 곳을 찾고 있어요.
아, 그렇군요. 위치가 좋은 곳도 중요하신가요?
네, 대중교통 이용이 편리한 곳이면 더 좋겠어요.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Hello. Could you recommend a hotel for me?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Hello. | Could you recommend a hotel for me?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Yes, what kind of hotel are you looking for?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Yes, | what kind of hotel are you looking for?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: I'm looking for a clean and quiet place under $100 per night.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: I'm looking for | a clean and quiet place | under $100 per night.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Oh, I see. Is a place with a good location also important?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Oh, I see. | Is a place with a good location | also important?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Yes, a place convenient for public transport would be even better.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Yes, | a place convenient for public transport | would be even better.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Understood. I will recommend a few places for you.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Understood. | I will recommend a few places for you.

highlight_sentences.korean_text: 1박에 100달러 이하로 깨끗하고 조용한 곳을 찾고 있어요.
highlight_sentences.foreign_text: I'm looking for a clean and quiet place under $100 per night.
highlight_sentences.reason: 이 문장은 사용자가 원하는 호텔의 가격대와 특징(깨끗하고 조용함)을 명확하게 전달하여 가장 중요합니다.
